{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Fisher sect
| introduced = cradle-02-soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Fishers]] have a way to draw objects in using their aspect of force.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c15">''Soulsmith'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Members of the [[Fisher sect]] carry giant bladed fishhooks as weapons.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c1">''Blackflame'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
